race.description: Rj Sidney Craig Country Boosted Mdn Plate
race.comment: STORMY REIGN (5) resumes today and was unlucky not to shed her Maiden tag last time in. Came to the end of her prep with a lacklustre seventh over 1175m at Albury last April. Assess on the good second at the Sapphire Coast two-back. Regular apprentice sticks and can put these away. PIRATESS (9) sharp drop in grade at her latest when she stalked the speed in the heavy going to run a courageous second over 1000m at Wagga. At her top now and has genuine winning claims from the good barrier. SUPERIOR STYLE (6) Exceed And Excel filly from Vintage Strike on debut for the Anthony Warren yard. Finished second in a Goulburn trial over 750m on July 3. Maps well and can make a winning debut. LOOKIN' SUAVE HARV (1) struck trouble at the start and failed to get into the contest with a disappointing sixth over 1200m at this track. Comes back in distance and can improve quickly.
